_meta.agent_final_summary:
## INTEGRATION SUMMARY

- **Skill/doc variant relied on**: No CometChat *skill* applied — the skills are all frontend UI-Kit families (React/Angular/Android/iOS/Flutter). Backend work is pure REST, so I used **docs-mcp** REST API pages: `/rest-api/authentication`, `/rest-api/users/create`, `/rest-api/auth-tokens/create`, `/rest-api/groups/create`, `/rest-api/groups/delete`, and `/calls/platform/user-sync`. Cross-checked against project memory (role→`metadata.appRole`, token-bootstrap shape).
- **Where docs were wrong/inconsistent**: The `/calls/platform/user-sync` page uses host `https://api-{region}.cometchat.io/v3` and header `apiKey`, while the authoritative `/rest-api/authentication` + every OpenAPI spec use the app-scoped host `https://{appId}.api-{region}.cometchat.io/v3` and lowercase header `apikey`. I followed the authoritative form; **validated live** (region `in`) — it works, the user-sync page's host is misleading.
- **Candidate hallucinations**: None shipped unverified. Every endpoint, the `members.{participants,moderators}`+`owner` inline group shape, and the `data.authToken` response field were confirmed from OpenAPI specs and then **exercised against the real API** (user create/update, token mint, group create with 3 members + scopes, group delete → 404).
- **Doc-escapes (web search / guessing)**: None. All answers came from docs-mcp + memory + live API responses.
- **Scope completed**: Backend fully done — auth-token flow, RBAC user mapping, 1:1 inquiry keying (via existing inquiry RBAC), dispute group create/delete, admin conversation purge, secrets in env only, build gate green. **Left to sibling components (out of scope for `backend/`)**: the actual frontend SDK login/conversation/calling UI in web/android/ios, which consume `POST /cometchat/token`.

Note: one unrelated env issue — a `PostToolUse` hook (`./hooks/log_tool.py`) is configured but the file doesn't exist, so every tool call logs a harmless "No such file" error. It didn't affect this work; you may want to fix or remove that hook.
